description_long: This object consists of three distinct orchid plants, each with a cluster of delicate flowers in shades of white, pale yellow, and light purple. The flowers are arranged on slender, arching stems that rise above broad, glossy green leaves. Each plant displays multiple blooms, with petals that are slightly overlapping and exhibit a bilateral symmetry typical of orchids. The leaves are thick, smooth, and ovate, radiating outward from the base of each plant. Fine, wiry roots are visible extending from the base, adding to the naturalistic appearance. The overall composition suggests a decorative arrangement suitable for urban parks, gardens, or indoor public spaces.
description: A group of three orchid plants with arching stems, delicate white, yellow, and purple flowers, and broad green ovate leaves. The arrangement is naturalistic, with visible roots and layered blooms.
description_view_0: Three orchid plants are visible, showing their arching stems, colorful flowers, and broad green leaves from a slightly elevated angle.
description_view_1: The side view emphasizes the height of the stems and the layering of the leaves, with the flowers appearing more vertically aligned.
description_view_2: This view highlights the front-facing blooms and the spread of the leaves, giving a clear look at the petal arrangement and color variation.
description_view_3: From this angle, the separation between the three plants is more pronounced, and the arching stems are more visible.
attribute_petal_arrangement: The petals are arranged in a bilateral symmetrical pattern, typical of orchids, with three outer sepals and three inner petals, one of which forms a distinct labellum. The petals slightly overlap and are layered, creating a whorled appearance.
